toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.command:
for pkg in "System.Text.Json" "Azure.Storage.Blobs" "Microsoft.Extensions.Logging" "Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting" "Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson" "xunit" "OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting"; do
  ver=$(curl -s "https://api.nuget.org/v3-flatcontainer/${pkg,,}/index.json" | python3 -c "import sys,json; versions=[v for v in json.load(sys.stdin)['versions'] if not any(t in v for t in ['-preview','-rc','-alpha','-beta','-pre'])]; print(versions[-1])" 2>/dev/null)
  echo "$pkg: $ver"
done
arguments.description: Look up latest stable NuGet package versions
